description: Auto-detected panel geometry for LTG motion spec sheets. Generated by LTG_TOOL_sheet_geometry_calibrate.py. Re-run after regenerating any motion sheet. C46: added background_style + occupancy_threshold_dark for byte and glitch (dark-sheet annotation_occupancy fix).

luma._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(80,120,200) from LTG_TOOL_luma_motion.py — blue family, not cyan
luma._annotation_bg_note: ANNOTATION_BG=(248,244,236) warm cream from LTG_TOOL_luma_motion.py; tol=12 excludes face-fill (250,240,220) which differs by 16 in B channel

byte._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(0,190,215) from LTG_TOOL_byte_motion.py — cyan family (ELEC_CYAN adjacent)
byte._background_style_note: C46: VOID_BLACK panels (10,10,20). annotation_occupancy uses bright-pixel counting (mean>40) with 1% threshold instead of 4% non-bg subtraction. Eliminates false WARN on panels B2-B4.

cosmo._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(80,120,200) from LTG_TOOL_cosmo_motion.py — blue family, matches Luma convention
cosmo._annotation_bg_note: ANNOTATION_BG=(248,244,238) warm cream from LTG_TOOL_cosmo_motion.py; tol=12 excludes light character fills (skin, cardigan highlights) that diverge more than 12 in any channel

miri._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(80,120,200) from LTG_TOOL_miri_motion.py — blue family, matches Luma/Cosmo convention
miri._annotation_bg_note: ANNOTATION_BG=(248,244,238) warm cream from LTG_TOOL_miri_motion.py; tol=12 excludes Miri skin fill (140,84,48) which diverges by 100+ in R channel — no false positives possible

miri_v002._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(80,120,200) from LTG_TOOL_miri_motion_v002.py — blue family, matches Luma/Cosmo/Miri v001 convention
miri_v002._annotation_bg_note: C46: same bg spec as miri v001. warm cream (248,244,238), tol=12.

glitch._beat_color_note: BEAT_COLOR=(255,140,0) CORRUPT_AMBER from LTG_TOOL_glitch_motion.py — amber, matches Glitch character palette (dark sheet — NOT blue)
glitch._background_style_note: C46: VOID_BLACK panels (10,10,20). annotation_occupancy uses bright-pixel counting (mean>40) with 1% threshold instead of 4% non-bg subtraction. Eliminates false WARN on Glitch panels B2-B3.
